languages.text: {n}После обыска лагеря удается установить, что это группа первопроходцев, отправленная на планету вашей предшественницей Теодорой. Никто из них не остался в живых — их тела, покрытые вулканическим пеплом, превратились в скорбные каменные изваяния, почти утратившие человеческий облик. Те немногие припасы и архивы экспедиции, что уцелели, разведчики приносят с собой на флагман. {/n}

{n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}После обыска лагеря удается установить, что это группа первопроходцев, отправленная на планету вашей предшественницей Теодорой. Те немногие припасы и архивы экспедиции, что уцелели, разведчики приносят с собой на флагман. {/n}

{n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}

languages.text: {n}キャンプを捜索した結果、このキャンプは、前任者テオドラによってこの惑星に送られた開拓者グループによって作られたことが判明した。開拓者たちは誰も生き残らなかった。火山灰に覆われた彼らの体は、悲しみに満ちた石像に変わり、ほとんど人間の形は失われていた。偵察隊は、探検隊のわずかな残された食料と記録を旗艦に持ち帰った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}キャンプを捜索した結果、このキャンプは、前任者テオドラによってこの惑星に送られた開拓者グループによって作られたことが判明した。開拓者たちは誰も生き残らなかった。火山灰に覆われた彼らの体は、悲しみに満ちた石像に変わり、ほとんど人間の形は失われていた。偵察隊は、探検隊のわずかな残された食料と記録を旗艦に持ち帰った。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras registrar el campamento, el equipo confirma que lo estableció un grupo de pioneros enviados por Theodora, tu predecesora. Ninguno de ellos sobrevivió. Sus cadáveres, cubiertos de ceniza volcánica, se han convertido en pesarosas estatuas de piedra, prácticamente despojadas de su forma humana. Los exploradores traen los propios suministros y registros que quedan a la nave insignia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras registrar el campamento, el equipo confirma que lo estableció un grupo de pioneros enviados por Theodora, tu predecesora. Ninguno de ellos sobrevivió. Sus cadáveres, cubiertos de ceniza volcánica, se han convertido en pesarosas estatuas de piedra, prácticamente despojadas de su forma humana. Los exploradores traen los propios suministros y registros que quedan a la nave insignia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}搜寻营地后，侦察队判定这是由你前任，西奥多拉派往该行星的一支先遣队所建。他们无一幸存——火山灰覆盖的遗体几无人形，化为一座座悲怆的石像。侦察队将远征队仅存的少许补给和记录带回了旗舰。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}搜寻营地后，侦察队判定这是由你前任，西奥多拉派往该行星的一支先遣队所建。他们无一幸存——火山灰覆盖的遗体几无人形，化为一座座悲怆的石像。侦察队将远征队仅存的少许补给和记录带回了旗舰。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nach der Durchsuchung des Lagers vermutet das Team, dass es von einer Gruppe von Pionieren errichtet wurde, die deine Vorgängerin Theodora auf den Planeten entsandt hatte. Keiner von ihnen hat überlebt ... ihre mit vulkanischer Asche bedeckten Leichen haben sich in anklagende Statuen verwandelt, die ihrer menschlichen Form fast vollständig beraubt wurden. Die Späher bringen die wenigen erhaltenen Vorräte und Aufzeichnungen der Expedition auf das Flaggschiff.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach der Durchsuchung des Lagers vermutet das Team, dass es von einer Gruppe von Pionieren errichtet wurde, die deine Vorgängerin Theodora auf den Planeten entsandt hatte. Keiner von ihnen hat überlebt ... ihre mit vulkanischer Asche bedeckten Leichen haben sich in anklagende Statuen verwandelt, die ihrer menschlichen Form fast vollständig beraubt wurden. Die Späher bringen die wenigen erhaltenen Vorräte und Aufzeichnungen der Expedition auf das Flaggschiff.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kampı aradıktan sonra ekip, bunun selefin Theodora'nın gezegene gönderdiği bir grup öncü tarafından kurulduğunu belirliyor. Hiçbiri hayatta kalmamış. Volkanik külle kaplı bedenleri, insan formlarını neredeyse tamamen yitirmiş kederli taş heykellere dönüşmüş. Gözcüler, keşif heyetinin hayatta kalan az sayıdaki malzemesini ve kayıtlarını sancak gemisine geri getiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After searching the camp, the team determines that it was set up by a group of pioneers sent to the planet by your predecessor Theodora. None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kampı aradıktan sonra ekip, bunun selefin Theodora'nın gezegene gönderdiği bir grup öncü tarafından kurulduğunu belirliyor. Hiçbiri hayatta kalmamış. Volkanik külle kaplı bedenleri, insan formlarını neredeyse tamamen yitirmiş kederli taş heykellere dönüşmüş. Gözcüler, keşif heyetinin hayatta kalan az sayıdaki malzemesini ve kayıtlarını sancak gemisine geri getiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La fouille du campement permet de déterminer qu'il a été installé par des pionniers envoyés par votre prédécesseure, Théodora, mais qu'aucun n'a survécu : leurs corps couverts de cendres et figés en statues de pierre lugubres sont presque méconnaissables. Les éclaireurs rapportent les quelques provisions et archives qu'ils trouvent au vaisseau amiral.{/n}

None of them survived — their bodies, covered in volcanic ash, have turned into mournful stone statues, almost completely robbed of their human form. The scouts bring the expedition's few surviving supplies and records back to the flagship.{/n}
